_comment: Default values for user-editable Bot Config settings. The dashboard reads these at init via GET /api/bot-config-defaults and uses them as the initial input value when .bot-config.json has no explicit override. The server also falls back to these when `getConfig` is asked for a value the user hasn't set. Keys here match the bot-config-v2 POSITION_KEYS / GLOBAL_KEYS naming so the same string flows from this file → dashboard input → .bot-config.json → bot reader.
_migration: low-gas-thresholds.json and residual-cleanup.json are still standalone — they will fold in here under nested groups (lowGasThresholds, residualCleanup) in a follow-up commit, at which point the standalone JSONs + their loaders + their static-tunables-routes entries can be deleted. ui-defaults.json and nft-providers.json stay standalone (different concern + data shape).
